slides.title: Three Daily Frictions
bullets: EHR note-taking consumes 2+ hours after shift for 61% of clinicians
Context switching between 4–7 systems fragments clinical reasoning
Discharge summaries are 80% boilerplate but still take 20 min each

slides.quote: I became a doctor to talk to patients, not to type. Most nights I'm still charting at 10pm.

slides.title: Copilot
slides.message: An AI that writes your notes, surfaces your data, and stays inside your workflow.

cards.text: Ambient Scribe — real-time consultation note drafting
Chart Whisperer — 30-second patient summaries from history
Discharge Auto-Draft — 2-min from plan to printable letter
Clinician Safety Net — drug / allergy / dose cross-check
